publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-10-02 23:59:06 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.langmaterial: Collection is primarily in English and Indonesian. Other languages include Dutch, French, Malay, and Japanese.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The Audrey Kahin papers (1921-2018, bulk 1950-2016) contains correspondence, research files, and publications documenting Kahin's scholarship on the history of Southeast Asia, predominantly Indonesia and Malaysia, and materials relating to the Cornell Southeast Asia Program (SEAP), Southeast Asia publications, and the Cornell Modern Indonesia Project (CMIP). The collection also includes research, translations, and publications originally created by George McTurnan Kahin and retained by Audrey Kahin as part of her research.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Audrey R. Kahin is a historian of Southeast Asia. She was born May 18, 1934 in Newcastle upon Tyne, England. She received her B.A. from the University of Nottingham in 1955, her M.A. from Cornell University in 1976 and her Ph.D. in Southeast Asian History in 1979. She was managing editor of Southeast Asia publications and editor of the journal Indonesia at Cornell University from 1978-1995.

Kahin is the author and editor of a number of publications, including Regional Dynamics of the Indonesian Revolution (1985), Subversion as Foreign Policy (with George Kahin) (1995), Rebellion to Integration (1999), Historical Dictionary of Indonesia 2nd and 3rd editions (with Robert Cribbs) (2004, 2015), and Islam, Nationalism and Democracy: A Political Biography of Mohammad Natsir (2012).

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Materials in box 15 folders 38-42, Burmese Sponsorship correspondence, are restricted to permission of the University Archivist.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Audrey Kahin papers, #14-27-4633. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: George McTurnan Kahin papers, #14-27-3146. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. George McTurnan Kahin Center for Advanced Research on Southeast Asia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revised and published versions of Kahin's chapter "Problems of Integration: West Sumatra's Place in Indonesia" published in The Politics of the Periphery in Indonesia: Geographical and Social Perspectives and presented in absentia at the 2002 NIRIM conference. Also includes conference program.
